name: orangepro
description: OrangePro local evidence graph, runtime coverage, and grounded test-generation MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Find behavioral test gaps and generate grounded tests.
interface.longDescription: OrangePro runs locally as an MCP server. It builds an evidence graph, ingests repo-native runtime coverage, exposes Proven / Runtime-covered / Associated / No-link status, and returns grounded test drafts with run hints. Model keys stay in your environment; no model is pinned by the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Run OrangePro on this repo and show test gaps.
Generate grounded tests for this PR with OrangePro.
Use OrangePro to write and run one missing test.
